title: verbascum orphanideum
intro: Verbascum orphanideum, also known as the Orphan Mullein, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mullein family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds that provide various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of Verbascum orphanideum are used to make herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to alleviate various health issues.
